title: [Evermore Hotel, Restaurant]
description: An impeccably dressed host stands alert behind a golden oak podium carved into a griffin, its wings spread wide, welcoming guests to the formal dining area.  Drink-laden trolley carts are pushed around by footmen waiting on patrons seated at various tables while additional kitchen staff quietly appear with silver serving trays piled high with smoked meats and assorted delicacies.  A bell dings repeatedly in the foyer just beyond a carved mahogany door.

wayto.32114: ;e table = "Witch"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
